name: intelpacket-suite
description: Monorepo for @intelpacket/core and @intelpacket/pii — deterministic structured-data packetization and optional privacy preprocessing.
author: Aproof LLC

scripts.bench:realistic: corepack pnpm run bench:core:realistic && corepack pnpm run bench:pii:realistic
scripts.bench:advanced: corepack pnpm run bench:core:advanced && corepack pnpm run bench:pii:advanced
scripts.bench:advanced:100k: corepack pnpm run bench:core:advanced -- --scale=100k && corepack pnpm run bench:pii:advanced -- --scale=100k
scripts.bench:advanced:strict:100k: corepack pnpm run bench:core:advanced -- --scale=100k --strict-scale && corepack pnpm run bench:pii:advanced -- --scale=100k --strict-scale
scripts.verify: corepack pnpm run build && corepack pnpm run typecheck && corepack pnpm run test
scripts.verify:core: corepack pnpm run build:core && corepack pnpm --filter @intelpacket/core run typecheck && corepack pnpm run test:core
scripts.verify:pii: corepack pnpm run build:core && corepack pnpm run build:pii && corepack pnpm --filter @intelpacket/pii run typecheck && corepack pnpm run test:pii
scripts.verify:integrity: corepack pnpm run verify:structure && corepack pnpm run test:integrity
scripts.verify:release: corepack pnpm run verify && corepack pnpm run verify:structure && corepack pnpm run pack:dry
